channel.title: Torchfinder
channel.description: Find official and third-party Shadowdark content, including adventures, supplements, and zines.

item.title: Soulblight - Hamartia
item.description: A 292-page Soulblight expansion set on the Mediterranean-inspired Islands of Hamartis, where the players are delivered to an island penal colony by royal decree. Multiple paths forward — escape, rebellion, or piracy — play out across a hexcrawl, a 50+ room dungeon, and 100+ new monsters.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Forest Adventures
item.description: A hex-based forest supplement for the Hawkmoor setting detailing Witchyflow Vale, adding the Oozeling ancestry, the Hermit class, 20 new spells, 15 new creatures, and 25 encounter-populated hexes with dual GM/player maps.
item.author: James Mishler

item.title: Against the Dark 3: Legend of the Archfiend
item.description: A free hexcrawl adventure featuring four elemental tombs, a hex-mapped wilderness region, and a climactic Dark Castle. A relic hunt against lethal traps and an archfiend.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright

item.title: Soulblight - Forever Hold Your Peace
item.description: A 3rd-to-5th level adventure set in the temple of Sandreaver, goddess of the Scorpionfolk. The party infiltrates the sacred hall during a major divine ceremony, contending with religious traps, ritual hazards, and the attendants of two competing deities.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - Swords and Sorceries
item.description: A free anthology of adventures covering the breadth of the Soulblight setting, taking parties across Lothorian's varied environments, from jungle temples and desert ruins to planar expeditions and underworld oddities across the seven realms.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - The First Cycle
item.description: A 240-page Soulblight expansion set in the prehistoric Nameless Valleys, long before Lothorian's kingdoms existed. Covers an early bronze-age world of tribal peoples in a hexcrawl format, including the Amber Hold dungeon, 100+ new monsters, period-appropriate gear, and rules for overland travel and early magical rites.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Temple of the Green Devil
item.description: A competitive tournament module in which two groups simultaneously plunder a jungle temple during a solar eclipse. Each group can hinder the other with summoned monsters, traps, and curses. Available in a free art-free edition and a paid deluxe edition.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: Pleasures of the Dream Palace
item.description: A dungeon crawl for 3rd- to 5th-level characters. Sinister demonic entanglements tied to a respectable village family lead to the Dream Palace: a surreal, trap-laden otherworldly space with a poor survival rate for visitors.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright

item.title: Celtic Shadows
item.description: A 162-page campaign sourcebook set in Mythic Ireland, covering levels 1–10. Includes cultural notes on Celtic history and mythology, 15+ adventures, a bestiary, two new classes, and optional mechanics for badly injured characters.
item.author: William Murakami-Brundage, Bryan O'Doherty

item.title: Shadowdome Thunderdark Zine: Community Sourced Adventure for Gary Con XVI
item.description: A community-sourced megadungeon generator created for Gary Con XVI, featuring 11 new monsters, 50 dungeon rooms, and trap and hazard roll tables with over 1,700 possible results.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Kazad Mor: The Cursed Dwarfhome
item.description: A 1st-level dungeon set in the abandoned halls of Kazad Mor, a cursed dwarven stronghold. Nearly forty rooms of hazards, monsters, and plunder await parties willing to plumb its depths.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright

item.title: Woeful Barrows And Other Places
item.description: An adventure anthology featuring nine distinct locations for levels 1–5. Each site presents its own hazards, inhabitants, and rewards for parties exploring the wider region.
item.author: William Murakami-Brundage

item.title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 2: Red Sands
item.description: The second Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG, adding a scorching desert region to the game. Introduces three classes, 14 monsters, rules for mounted combat, pit fighting, poisons, and lasting wounds, plus two new locations: the 4th–6th level dungeon Fortress of the Burning Brothers and The Djurum desert hex crawl.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 3: Midnight Sun
item.description: The third Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG, setting adventures in a harsh Norse-inspired archipelago. Adds two classes, 12 monsters, rules for boats, oaths, and arctic conditions, plus two new locations: the 0-level gauntlet Hoard of the Sea Wolf King and the Isles of Andrik hex crawl.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Soulblight - The Dying Vale
item.description: An 82-page Soulblight hexcrawl set in a region of Lothorian already lost to the Sovereigns' corruption, populated by scattered survivors. Includes the Old Hero's Tomb dungeon, 90+ new monsters, and mechanics for tracking the blight's advance.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Hawkmoor Geographica
item.description: A 48-page geographic gazetteer covering 70 regions of the Great Enchanted Vale in the Hawkmoor campaign setting, each with encounter tables. Provides GMs with detailed terrain to support sandbox play in Shadowdark.
item.author: James Mishler, Jodi Moran-Mishler

item.title: Kaldera of the Sickle-Dancer
item.description: A 3rd-level dungeon wound through the volcanic caldera lair of a warrior-dancer transformed into a marilith through dark sorcery. Twenty-one chambers of deadly encounters fill the winding passages below.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: The Pits of Brund
item.description: A 70-page megadungeon spanning levels 1–6. A recently rediscovered series of caves descends deep into the barrow-earth, with six layers of encounters, hazards, and plunder waiting below.
item.author: William Murakami-Brundage

item.title: One With Nature: The Druid Class
item.description: A free druid class. The Druid explores the natural world and channels its power in combat, including the ability to wild-shape into animal forms.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: The Tomb of the Hunters
item.description: A 5-room dungeon created for the Shadowdark Independent Game Jam. Features evocative monster encounters and layered exploration in a compact tomb.
item.author: William Murakami-Brundage

item.title: Her Sun-Shattered Tears
item.description: A free 1st-level dungeon delve originally created for the Shadowdark Independent Game Jam. Ten chambers of deadly traps and monsters, driven by an evocative sun-goddess theme.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: Reaping at Beltine
item.description: A 3rd-level adventure in the town of Beltine, on the anniversary of a brutal family slaughter. The Kugo family has returned from death as monstrous risen puppets, and the town's survival depends on the party.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright

item.title: Shadowdark RPG
item.description: The complete Shadowdark RPG core rules: a dark fantasy dungeon crawling game with a lean d20 system and real-time torch tracking that keeps sessions fast and tense. The 326-page book covers four base classes, the Western Reaches setting, a bestiary, and introductory adventures. Winner of the 2024 Three Castles Award and four gold ENNIEs including Product of the Year.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Arcanist
item.description: A class supplement presenting three flavors of arcane practitioner: the faithful mage-priest, the cultist who serves arcane spirits, and the occultist who channels primordial sorcery.
item.author: William Murakami-Brundage

item.title: City of Hawkmoor
item.description: A fantasy city designed for use with the Shadowdark RPG. City of Hawkmoor provides the framework for the Hawkmoor campaign setting, detailing the city at the heart of the Great Enchanted Vale.
item.author: James Mishler

item.title: Expanded Dragons
item.description: A dragon generation system covering six dragon types across 1st- to 20th-level power tiers. Each dragon is individually assembled from stats, talents, magic, and treasure rather than pulled from a single fixed template.
item.author: James Mishler

item.title: SoloDark: Solo Rules for Shadowdark RPG
item.description: The official free solo rules for Shadowdark RPG: a 12-page PDF providing an oracle system, random prompt tables, and alternate mechanics for GMless solo play.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Shrine of the Jaguar Princess
item.description: A 4th-level dungeon set within the ziggurat of an ancient jungle princess. Twenty-six trap-filled chambers of puzzles and ambushes guard a golden idol and stranger secrets beyond. Silver ENnie Award winner (Best Adventure, 2023).
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: The King: Shadowdark RPG Class
item.description: A Conan-inspired martial class. The King leads allies through danger, accumulates power through bold deeds rather than careful planning, and builds a living legend through conquest and adventure.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright

item.title: The Witch, the Shepherd, His Goats, and Their Daughter
item.description: A fairy tale forest point-crawl for 1st- to 2nd-level characters. The shepherd's daughter and goats have been stolen by the Witch of the Woods. Twelve forest encounter sites full of strange, fearsome, and fey monsters stand between the party and their return. Suitable for one to three sessions.
item.author: James Mishler

item.title: Ancient Talismans: The Whisperer Class
item.description: A free class blending physical combat with psychic ability. The Whisperer channels power through ancient talismans, combining martial capability with mental influence.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: Brains and Brawn: The Library Knight Class
item.description: A free class combining martial training with scholarly study. The Library Knight applies academic knowledge of monsters, dungeon hazards, and basic magic alongside solid combat capability.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: Creature Classes
item.description: Eight playable creature ancestry classes, usable as both player characters and monstrous opponents: Catkin, Equizards, Mind Mice, Petty Dragons, Shimmercats, Spirit Foxes, Sternulfs, and Wink Dogs. Includes a creature-specific background table.
item.author: James Mishler

item.title: Double Trouble: The Dancer Class
item.description: A free class built around dual-wielding and evasion. The Dancer uses rapid movement and two-weapon techniques to outmaneuver opponents in close combat.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: Familiar Brews: The Practitioner Class
item.description: A free Practitioner class. The Practitioner bonds with a powerful familiar and brews magical concoctions to aid allies and hinder foes.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: Five Mini-Adventures
item.description: Five standalone two-page adventures for 3rd–6th level characters, each set in a distinct location: an ancient horror-filled monolith, a sinking sea-palace prison, a desert cult temple, a pirate cavern, and a leprechaun's fey redoubt.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Lost Caves of the Worm-Witch
item.description: A 3rd-level dungeon set in the subterranean lair of an undead bard, featuring bizarre hybrid undead creatures and layered environments spanning a scorpion-god temple, kobold idol cult, and dark elf catacombs.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: Off the Chain: The Sk8r Boi Class
item.description: A free Sk8r Boi class. A sidewalk-surfer brought to the dungeon, using speed and acrobatic tricks to shred the darkness below.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: Plague Jewels of Sekhmet
item.description: A 0-level funnel set in the ruins of a cenotaph dedicated to the war-goddess Sekhmet. Characters awaken deep in the tomb with no memories and a spreading plague, and must fight through twelve lethal chambers to reach the surface. Includes optional tournament play rules.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: Shapeshifter Class
item.description: A class focused on mastering animal forms through study and attunement. The Shapeshifter bonds with animals over time, gaining the ability to communicate with them and transform into their physical forms.
item.author: James Mishler

item.title: Soulblight - A Shadowdark Setting
item.description: The first major third-party setting for Shadowdark, set in the kingdom of Lothorian as it succumbs to the Soulblight: a spreading corruption unleashed by powerful ancient beings called the Sovereigns. Covers all seven regions with maps, two new classes, 100+ monsters, and optional survival and corruption rules.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - Blades, Guts & Gold
item.description: The second Soulblight supplement, focused on henchmen who follow adventurers into the depths for pay. Offers 14 henchman classes across combat, support, and utility, alongside mechanics for follower loyalty and character customization through random tables.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - Champions of Lothorian
item.description: The first character supplement for the Soulblight setting, adding six classes suited to Lothorian's grim world: Bard, Dreamwalker, Pyromancer, Reaver, Starspeaker, and Templar. Includes 50+ new spells and magical abilities, two new magical disciplines, and shrine mechanics for Lothorian's gods.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - The Indigo Outpost Feuilleton
item.description: A seven-issue broadsheet zine expanding each of Lothorian's regions, from the Lothor Desert to the Blue Glades. Each issue adds regional lore, monster ecologies, bounty targets, new items, and locations for Soulblight campaigns.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - Vagrants and Vagabonds
item.description: The third Soulblight character supplement, adding eight classes reflecting Lothorian's harsh social realities: Alchemist, Bandit, Beggar, Blight Doctor, Gladiator, Graverobber, Mauler, and Vestal of Fire. Includes expanded gear, rival NPC adventurers, and optional rules for madness and serious wounds.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: The Beast: Werewolf Class
item.description: A half-feral class built around primal instincts and escalating physical power. At higher levels, the Beast unlocks full werewolf transformation, bringing savage ferocity to combat.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright

item.title: Tomb of the Dusk Queen
item.description: A compact 1st-level dungeon with fourteen rooms spread across the tomb of the Dusk Queen. Short enough for a single session and well-suited to introducing players to Shadowdark's lethal pace.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: Two Strong Arms: The Barbarian Class
item.description: A free Barbarian class. A mighty martial class built around raw physical power and ferocity.
item.author: Jake Savala

item.title: Unnatural Selection: A Supplement for use with Shadowdark
item.description: A 160-page third-party supplement expanding character options with 12 new ancestries, 6 new classes, 120 spells, and new monsters and magic items, plus a zero-level gauntlet adventure and three one-shot adventures.
item.author: Bunni Daniel

item.title: Shadowdark RPG Quickstart Set
item.description: A free two-booklet introduction to Shadowdark RPG: a 68-page Player's Guide with the core rules and eight premade 1st-level characters, and a 68-page GM's Guide with encounter tools and a ready-to-run dungeon adventure. Suitable for characters of 1st through 3rd level.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne
